summary: P0 Features Testing Complete - Agent Portal and Breed Tags Manager both working correctly. Agent Portal provides dedicated /agent route with login page showing only Service Desk after authentication. Breed Tags Manager in Admin Panel displays all 460 products with ability to add breed tags via Edit button or bulk selection.

details: Login page with username/password fields (data-testid: agent-username-input, agent-password-input)
Sign In to Service Desk button (data-testid: agent-login-button)
Clean purple gradient background with headphones icon
After login: Shows only Service Desk component
Header shows 'Service Desk - The Doggy Company'
User info badge showing username and 'Agent' role
Logout button (data-testid: agent-logout-button) working correctly
No other admin features visible (Products, Orders, etc. hidden)
Service Desk shows: 35 Open Tickets, 1 Critical, 16 High Priority, 12 Last 24h
Category filters: Celebrate (7), Dine (15), Travel (2), Stay (8), Enjoy (0)
Logout button visible in header
Clicking logout clears session and returns to login page
Login form fields are cleared after logout
Header: 'Breed Tags Manager' with description 'Tag products by breed for personalized recommendations'
Stats cards: Total Products (460), Tagged Products (2), Untagged Products (458), Selected (0)
Search bar for filtering products
Breed filter dropdown with 39 breed options
Refresh button
Product table with columns: Checkbox, Product (image + name), Category, Price, Breed Tags, Actions
Products show breed tags as purple badges (e.g., Labrador, Golden Retriever, Beagle)
'+X' badge for additional tags beyond 3 displayed
Edit button for each product row

endpoints_tested.response: Returns 39 breed options including Labrador, Golden Retriever, German Shepherd, etc.
Updates single product breed tags successfully
Bulk updates breed tags for multiple products

details: Checkbox selection for multiple products
'Tag X Products' button appears when products selected
Bulk modal shows: 'Bulk Tag X Products' title
Breed options displayed as checkboxes in 2-column grid
Breeds shown: Labrador, Golden Retriever, German Shepherd, Beagle, Poodle, Bulldog, French Bulldog, Rottweiler, Yorkshire Terrier, Boxer
Action buttons: Cancel, Remove Tags, Add Tags

critical_code_review_comments: AgentPortal.jsx: Well-implemented with proper session management using localStorage, clean login form with data-testid attributes
BreedTagsManager.jsx: Good implementation with stats, search, filter, and bulk selection functionality
server.py: BREED_TAG_OPTIONS constant provides 39 breed options, APIs for single and bulk updates working correctly
seed_data_creation: Added breed tags to 2 products via API testing: Classic Peanut Butter Cake and Banana Bliss Cake
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 features fully tested and working. Agent Portal at /agent provides dedicated Service Desk access for non-admin roles with login/logout functionality. Breed Tags Manager in Admin Panel (Operations > Breed Tags) shows 460 products with ability to add breed tags individually via Edit button or in bulk via checkbox selection. 2 products currently have breed tags assigned. All backend APIs working correctly.
